author: Divyesh Thirukonda
name: Candidate: PR315-derived frontier base with budgeted experimental branches
blurb: Frontier-derived candidate forked from PR315's 11L XSA4 + EMA + Partial RoPE + LN Scale base. The default submission path keeps standard zstd export and TTT disabled, while a rejected custom packed codec branch and a budget-capped long-document LoRA TTT branch remain available behind explicit flags for further experimentation. Late QAT is treated as audited rather than a claimed standalone lever.
